theorem.name: architecture_synthesis_theorem
theorem.statement: Given H(I), A(I), M_feas(I) and the survived theorem frontier, there exists a minimal modular architecture family whose patch backbone, fiber attachments, transport core, protocol bridge, and theorem monitor jointly satisfy the current encoding and online-closure constraints.
theorem.main_risk: minimality and uniqueness are still weak; theorem currently proves constructive sufficiency more than uniqueness
